dailyNews.title: Trump announces Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Trump says Israel and Lebanon will enter a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington, D.C. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports, and Eleanor Watson has the latest details after Pentagon officials briefed the press on the Iran war and the U.S. blockade at Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz.
